items.title: AI SafetyOmics: Cell Painting AI Modeling
items.message: Thanks for all your hard work this year in support of establishing Cell Painting as a high-throughput safety assay at AstraZeneca. It has been a challenging year with many twists and turns and last-minute deadlines that required you all to drive the train while simultaneously building its engine. Your dedication, flexibility, and solution-oriented approach have delivered an analytical pipeline and have been exemplary, and it will be the WOW model to aspire to across other joint initiatives. I am looking forward to working together with you on finalizing the promising work started in 2025, expanding it to additional safety predictions, and driving it toward direct project impact in Q2 next year!

items.title: R&D Awards Winner
items.message: Congratulations on your 2025 R&D Awards win. This well-deserved recognition reflects your dedication, creativity, and impact. Your contributions advance our science, strengthen the pipeline, and help us deliver for patients.

items.title: AI Safety Omics Support
items.message: Thank you for your effort this year to build and develop the AI Safety Omics platform. We have seen a tremendous impact on projects already with this critical workstream to accelerate our small molecules programs.

items.title: Thank You for the Deep Learning Face-to-Face
items.message: Well done, everyone, for a successful year in deep learning. This year we met our scorecard target of delivering volumetric segmentation, marking a successful collaboration with ODS to produce a state-of-the-art model; delivered more than 5 internal and external presentations, including AACR, R&D IT Tech Talks, and multiple IT showcases; and supported GraphITE to the end to ensure final results were computed. We finished the year in a very strong position, with our next steps very clear: grow our user base, build our influence across the business, and provide reusable AI tools that are task-agnostic and general enough to solve a number of problems across AZ. I am very proud of the work we have achieved.

items.title: Contributing to the Gothenburg Community
items.message: Thank you for taking part in Gothenburg Highlights Speakers' Corner, taking time to prepare and delivering an excellent presentation for Gothenburg colleagues. Your engagement helps us to enhance networking, spread knowledge, learn and inspire each other.

items.title: Diwali Celebration Success
items.message: We are thrilled to extend our heartfelt gratitude and congratulations to our incredible team of volunteers who orchestrated the magnificent Diwali celebration at the Gothenburg site. Your dedication and hard work have made this event a shining example of our vibrant cultural diversity and inclusive spirit. Your efforts in creating a colorful and lively atmosphere, complete with traditional attire, Bollywood music, and delightful sweet and savory Fika, did not go unnoticed. We have received exceptional feedback from colleagues as well as senior leaders. Thank you once again for your exceptional contributions.

items.title: Gothenburg IT Showcase
items.message: On behalf of the R&D IT Leadership Team, we wanted to express our gratitude and appreciation for your support during the “Tech or Treat” showcase in Gothenburg. We truly came together as #OneIT to highlight the tools, technology, and new innovations making a difference to our business and the patients we serve. We brought together topics from R&D IT and Enterprise Technology Services (ETS).

items.title: 2023 Deep Learning Team Efforts
items.message: Well done, everyone, for a successful year in deep learning. This year we met our scorecard target of delivering volumetric segmentation, marking a successful collaboration with ODS to produce a state-of-the-art model; delivered more than five internal and external presentations, including AACR, R&D IT Tech Talks, and multiple IT showcases; and supported GraphITE to the end to ensure final results were computed. We finished the year in a very strong position, with our next steps very clear: grow our user base, build our influence across the business, and provide reusable AI tools that are task-agnostic and general enough to solve a number of problems across AZ. I am very proud of the work we have achieved.

items.title: Gothenburg Tech or Treat IT Showcase
items.message: On behalf of the R&D IT Leadership Team, we wanted to express our gratitude and appreciation for your support during the “Tech or Treat” showcase last week in Gothenburg. We truly came together as #OneIT to highlight the tools, technology, and new innovations making a difference to our business and the patients we serve. We brought together topics from R&D IT and Enterprise Technology Services, spending the afternoon with the teams!

items.title: Well Done on Foundational Models
items.message: I just want to recognize everyone on the Foundational Models team for their attention to detail and gusto in kicking off the new Foundational Models project. Great job working through the teething issues that come with a new project; keep up the great communication within the team, and look forward to seeing an amazing reusable pipeline that will provide AZ with a great platform.

items.title: Poster Presentation — AZ Data Science Symposium
items.message: Balaji and Shalini, I would like to express my appreciation for your interest in and efforts toward presenting a poster at the AZ Data Science Symposium. You set an example for other team members to take part in both external and internal events, very much aligned with our strategy of leading with AI and insights.

items.title: Umagine Event
items.message: Received great support from each 1 of you in putting together material for the Umagine event and your active participation is much appreciated. Proud to have represented AstraZeneca in a public conference. Hope to have more such collaborative effort in taking part in external events as a team and setting an example of "We play to win".

items.title: IIT Interns Selection for R&D IT
items.message: Balaji was a key member with valuable contribution in designing the selection process and interview questions, and was involved in the technical evaluation of the IIT candidates in identifying the right talents for the R&D IT - AI Engineering team. His commitment and involvement was exemplary.

items.title: CT Segmentation on POSEIDON
items.message: At the date of writing, I presented our model's inference on POSEIDON. The predictions were considerably better than the stakeholder's alternative model, and pretty comparable to the stakeholder's own annotations. There is still work to do—we are not completely celebrating yet—but considering it's not been trained on POSEIDON these are really exciting and promising signs. Great work.

items.title: IT Excellence Award
items.message: This award is in recognition for your outstanding contribution to 'R&D IT use AI to revolutionise how we extract complex tumours and organs from CT images', demonstrating excellence in the category of Accelerate Innovation & Delivery. On behalf of myself and the IT Leadership Team, I would like to offer my congratulations and show our appreciation of your commitment and resilience.

items.title: Kaggle Win — Bronze Medal
items.message: Congratulations team for participating in the global Kaggle competition in "Multimodal Single-Cell Integration" and ranking 76th in a total set of 1200+ teams globally. Great to see your spirit in challenging a real world problem. This has provided an opportunity to showcase our capability to handle Single-Cell Analysis data. Very much correlated to our core value of "We play to win".

items.title: Lead AI with Insights — Deep Learning Kaggle Win
items.message: Balaji participated in a Kaggle challenge, "Happywhale - Whale and Dolphin Identification", using a deep learning model. Our model was able to uniquely identify 15,587 individuals belonging to 26 different species, given a training data set of 51,033 training images. The pipeline secured 29th position (Top 2%) among 1500+ participants with 0.82696 (MAP@5) in the final leaderboard.

items.title: Great Presentation to Business Analysts
items.message: Well done presenting the DIME project to business analysts. I was impressed with your ability to convey technical concepts at a high level that others could understand. This helps raise the profile of our projects and opens up future opportunities for collaborations within AZ. Great job!

items.title: GraphITE Contribution to Oncology
items.message: I wanted to personally thank you for your work on GraphITE for Early Oncology. The improvements to GraphITE both in the prediction and exploration side has helped pathologists understand disease progression in WSI's. Deploying GraphITE on AI Bench will now provide advanced imaging analysis to so many more scientists. Keep up the great work team!

items.title: Successfully Organizing Shaastra
items.message: Great work by the entire team in organizing the Shaastra event, working tirelessly day and night to evaluate the submissions.

items.title: AZimov Release
items.message: Thanks for your work towards releasing AZimov which will not only help our team deliver better imaging models faster in the future but will likely empower many others within the organisation. This is a great pioneering example of how adopting a culture of software engineering and sharing best practices can help accelerate development and innovation within AstraZeneca.

items.title: NCAT — Top 4 Nationally
items.message: Placed 4th nationally in the National Creativity Aptitude Test (NCAT) conducted by IIT Delhi — a top-4 finish among participants from across the country.
